inputs.name: backgroundColor
inputs.description:
Sets the background color of the avatar.

If an image is provided, this will be ignored.

inputs.name: borderColor
inputs.description: Sets the border color of the avatar.

inputs.name: borderRadius
inputs.description:
Sets the border radius of the avatar.
Can be a percentage or pixel value.

inputs.name: borderWidth
inputs.description:
Sets the border width of the avatar.
Can be a pixel value.

inputs.name: customStyles
inputs.description:
Custom styles to apply to the avatar.
This can be used to override default styles or add additional styles.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description:
Sets the height of the avatar.
Can be a pixel value or a string with units (e.g., "64px").

inputs.name: image
inputs.description:
Sets the image URL for the avatar.
If an image is provided, the avatar will display the image instead of a label.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description:
Sets the label for the avatar.
If an image is provided, this will be ignored.

inputs.name: labelColor
inputs.description:
Sets the color of the label text.
If an image is provided, this will be ignored.

inputs.name: labelFontSize
inputs.description:
Sets the font size of the label text.
If an image is provided, this will be ignored.

inputs.name: labelFontWeight
inputs.description:
Sets the font weight of the label text.
If an image is provided, this will be ignored.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description:
Sets the width of the avatar.
Can be a pixel value or a string with units (e.g., "64px").

inputs.name: checkBy
inputs.description: The key selector used to determine the node's check state.

inputs.name: checkedKeys
inputs.description: The keys of the nodes that are checked.

inputs.name: checkedKeysChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the checked keys change.

inputs.name: hasCheckbox
inputs.description: A predicate function that determines whether a node has a checkbox.

inputs.name: nodeCheck
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is checked or unchecked.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Options for the checkable behavior.

inputs.name: disableBy
inputs.description: The key selector used to determine the node's disable state.'

inputs.name: disabledKeys
inputs.description: The keys of the nodes that are disabled.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Options for the disable behavior.

inputs.name: nodeDrag
inputs.description: Emitted while a node is being dragged.

inputs.name: nodeDragEnd
inputs.description: Emitted when a node drag ends.

inputs.name: nodeDragStart
inputs.description: Emitted when a node drag starts.

inputs.name: nodeDrop
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is dropped.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Options for the draggable behavior.

inputs.name: filter
inputs.description: The filter value.

inputs.name: filterChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the filter value changes.

inputs.name: filterPlaceholder
inputs.description: The placeholder text for the filter input.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Options for the filterable behavior.

inputs.name: nodeSelect
inputs.description: Emitted when a node is selected or deselected.

inputs.name: selectBy
inputs.description: The key selector used to determine the node's select state.'

inputs.name: selectedKeys
inputs.description: The keys of the nodes that are selected.

inputs.name: selectedKeysChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the selected keys change.

inputs.name: selectionChange
inputs.description: Emitted when the selection changes.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Options for the selectable behavior.

inputs.name: ariaHasPopup
inputs.description: Sets the aria-haspopup attribute of the button.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the button.

inputs.name: iconOnly
inputs.description:
Sets the icon-only state of the button.
When set to true, the button will appear as square.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description:
Sets the loading state of the button.
When set to true, the button will display a loading indicator and be disabled.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Sets the look of the button.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the button.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description: Sets the selected state of the button.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the button.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description: Sets the tabindex of the button.

inputs.name: toggleable
inputs.description:
Sets the toggleable state of the button.
If set to `true`, the button will toggle its selected state on click.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Sets the aria-label for the chip host element.

inputs.name: contentClick
inputs.description: Emits when the chip is activated (clicked or keyboard triggered).

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the chip.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description:
Sets the label of the chip.

If the label is set, the chip will display the label instead of the content.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Sets the look of the chip.

inputs.name: removable
inputs.description:
Sets the removable state of the chip.
If true, the chip will display a remove icon.

inputs.name: remove
inputs.description: Emits when the {@link removable} is set to true and the remove icon is clicked.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the rounded state of the chip.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description: Sets the selected state of the chip.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the chip.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description: Sets the tabindex of the chip.

inputs.name: toggleable
inputs.description: Sets the toggleable state of the chip.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Sets the value of the chip. Useful for identification in selection scenarios.

inputs.name: ariaDescribedBy
inputs.description:
Sets the aria-describedby attribute of the autocomplete input.
Use this to associate error messages or help text with the input.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Sets the aria-label attribute of the autocomplete component.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: Sets the aria-labelledby attribute of the autocomplete component.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to close. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: closed
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is closed.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Sets the data of the autocomplete component.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the autocomplete component.

inputs.name: itemDisabled
inputs.description: Sets the predicate function that determines whether an item is disabled.

inputs.name: highlightFirst
inputs.description: Defines whether the first matching item should be highlighted while typing.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Sets the loading state of the autocomplete component.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is about to open. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: opened
inputs.description: Emits after the popup is opened.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Sets the placeholder text to be shown when there is no value selected.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: Sets the class of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupHeight
inputs.description: Sets the height of the popup element.

inputs.name: popupWidth
inputs.description: Sets the width of the popup element.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Sets the readonly state of the autocomplete component.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Sets the required state of the autocomplete component.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the autocomplete component.

inputs.name: showClearButton
inputs.description: Shows or hides the clear button.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the autocomplete component.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description:
Sets the text field of the autocomplete component.
It can be null, string, or a function that takes an item and returns a string.
If null, the item itself will be used as the text representation.

inputs.name: valueField
inputs.description:
Sets the value field of the autocomplete component.
It can be null, string, or a function that takes an item and returns a string.
If null, the item itself will be used as the value representation.

inputs.name: tagCount
inputs.description: Sets the number of tags to display before the summary tag is displayed.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the radio button.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the textarea.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the input.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the input.

inputs.name: actionClick
inputs.description: The event emitted when an action button is clicked.

inputs.name: connectedList
inputs.description: The connected list box for transferring items.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description: Sets the height of the list box.

inputs.name: items
inputs.description: The items of the list box.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The border radius of the list box.

inputs.name: selectBy
inputs.description:
The selector to extract the key from an item.
It can be a string representing the property name or a function that takes an item and returns its key.

inputs.name: selectedKeys
inputs.description: The keys of the selected items.

inputs.name: selectedKeysChange
inputs.description: The event emitted when the selected keys change.

inputs.name: selectionChange
inputs.description:
The event emitted when the selection changes.
It contains the selected and deselected items.

inputs.name: selectionMode
inputs.description: The selection mode of the list box.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the list box.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description:
The selector to extract the text from an item.
It can be a string representing the property name or a function that takes an item and returns its text.

inputs.name: toolbar
inputs.description:
Sets the toolbar options of the list box.
It can be a boolean to enable/disable the toolbar or an object to customize the toolbar.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description: Sets the width of the list box.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description: Sets the height of the list view.

inputs.name: listClass
inputs.description: Sets the classes of the inner UL element.

inputs.name: listItemClass
inputs.description: Sets the classes of the list items.

inputs.name: listItemStyle
inputs.description: Sets the style of the list items.

inputs.name: listStyle
inputs.description: Sets the style of the list.

inputs.name: items
inputs.description: The items to display in the list.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the rounding of the list.

inputs.name: scrollBottom
inputs.description: Emits when the list has scrolled to the bottom.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the list.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description: Sets the field to display in the list.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description: Sets the width of the list view.

inputs.name: firstLast
inputs.description: Whether to show the first and last page buttons.

inputs.name: pageChange
inputs.description: The event emitted when the page changes.

inputs.name: pageInput
inputs.description: Whether to show the page input.

inputs.name: pageSize
inputs.description: The page size.

inputs.name: pageSizeChange
inputs.description: The event emitted when the page size changes.

inputs.name: pageSizeValues
inputs.description: The page size values.

inputs.name: previousNext
inputs.description: Whether to show the previous and next page buttons.

inputs.name: responsive
inputs.description: Whether to make the pager responsive.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The rounded of the pager.

inputs.name: showInfo
inputs.description: Whether to show the info section.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: The size of the pager.

inputs.name: skip
inputs.description: The skip of the pager.

inputs.name: total
inputs.description: The total of the pager.

inputs.name: type
inputs.description: The type of the pager.

inputs.name: visiblePages
inputs.description: The visible pages of the pager.

inputs.name: anchor
inputs.description: The anchor element or point for the popup.

inputs.name: anchorConnectionPoint
inputs.description: The connection point for the popup anchor.

inputs.name: animation
inputs.description: The animation settings for the popup.

inputs.name: backdropClass
inputs.description: The class or classes to apply to the backdrop of the popup.

inputs.name: close
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is closed.

inputs.name: closeOnBackdropClick
inputs.description:
Whether to close the popup when clicking on the backdrop.
Only applies when the popup has a backdrop.

inputs.name: closeOnEscape
inputs.description: Whether to close the popup when the escape key is pressed.

inputs.name: closeOnMouseLeave
inputs.description: Whether to close the popup when the mouse leaves the anchor element.

inputs.name: closeOnOutsideClick
inputs.description: Whether to close the popup when clicking outside of it.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Arbitrary data to pass to the popup.

inputs.name: hasBackdrop
inputs.description: Whether the popup should have a backdrop.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description: The height of the popup.

inputs.name: maxHeight
inputs.description: The maximum height of the popup.

inputs.name: maxWidth
inputs.description: The maximum width of the popup.

inputs.name: minHeight
inputs.description: The minimum height of the popup.

inputs.name: minWidth
inputs.description: The minimum width of the popup.

inputs.name: offset
inputs.description: The offset of the popup from the anchor.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Emits when the popup is opened.

inputs.name: popupClass
inputs.description: The class or classes to apply to the popup.

inputs.name: popupConnectionPoint
inputs.description: The connection point for the popup.

inputs.name: popupWrapperClass
inputs.description: The class or classes to apply to the popup wrapper.

inputs.name: positionStrategy
inputs.description:
The strategy for positioning the popup.
`global` means the popup will be positioned relative to the viewport,
`connected` means the popup will be positioned relative to the anchor element.

inputs.name: positions
inputs.description:
The positions to use for the popup.
The popup will try to position itself in the first position that fits.
This is only used when the `positionStrategy` is set to `connected`.

inputs.name: preventClose
inputs.description:
Called when the popup is requested to close.
This can be used to prevent the popup from closing.

inputs.name: providers
inputs.description: The providers that will be injected into the popup.

inputs.name: trigger
inputs.description: The trigger event for opening the popup.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description: The width of the popup.

inputs.name: withPush
inputs.description: Whether to push the popup into the screen when it is opened.

inputs.name: withScrollTracking
inputs.description: Whether the popup should track scroll events and reposition itself.

inputs.name: filter
inputs.description:
The filter to select elements that will have tooltips.
It can be a CSS selector that matches elements within the host element.
Only applies when `mode` is set to `content`.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description:
The mode of the tooltip.
"host" mode receives the tooltip from the host element's title attribute.
"content" mode uses the title attribute of elements matching the filter.

inputs.name: position
inputs.description: The position of the tooltip relative to the target element.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The border radius of the tooltip.

inputs.name: position
inputs.description: The position of the tooltip relative to the target element.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The border radius of the tooltip.

inputs.name: animate
inputs.description:
Whether to animate the tree.
If true, the tree will animate when expanding or collapsing nodes.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
The accessible label for the tree.
Should describe the purpose of the tree to screen reader users.

inputs.name: children
inputs.description:
The children selector for the tree.
It can be either of the following:
- A string representing the property name of the children.
- A function that returns the children of a node.
- A function that returns an observable that emits the children of a node.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: The data for the tree.

inputs.name: hasChildren
inputs.description:
The predicate to determine if a node has children.
Required if the children selector is set to a function that returns an observable.

inputs.name: idField
inputs.description:
The field that represents the unique identifier of a node.
This is required if the data structure is set to `flat`.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description:
The data structure of the tree.
It can be either of the following:
- `flat`: The tree is a flat list of nodes.
- `hierarchical`: The tree is a hierarchical structure.
If the data structure is set to `flat`, the following fields are required:
- idField
- parentIdField
If the data structure is set to `hierarchical`, the following fields are required:
- children
- hasChildren

inputs.name: blur
inputs.description: Emits when the tree-view loses focus.

inputs.name: focus
inputs.description: Emits when the tree-view gains focus.

inputs.name: nodeClick
inputs.description: The node click event emitter.

inputs.name: parentIdField
inputs.description:
The field that represents the parent identifier of a node.
This is required if the data structure is set to `flat`.

inputs.name: textField
inputs.description:
The text field for the tree.
It can be either of the following:
- A string representing the property name of the text.
- A function that returns the text of a node.

inputs.name: allowEmpty
inputs.description:
When set to false, at least one button must remain selected in single selection mode.
Clicking a selected button will not deselect it. Defaults to true (allows empty selection).

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
Sets the disabled state of the button group.
If true, all buttons in the group will be disabled.

inputs.name: look
inputs.description: Sets the look of the button group.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the rounded style of the button group.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the button group.

inputs.name: selection
inputs.description: Sets the selection mode of the button group.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: ARIA label for the dropdown button.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledby

inputs.description: Sets the loading state of the button.

inputs.name: anchor
inputs.description:
The anchor element that the context menu will be anchored to.
Only applicable when `precise` is set to `false`.

inputs.name: anchorConnectionPoint
inputs.description:
The anchor connection point of the popup menu.
Only applicable when `precise` is set to `false`.

inputs.name: menuClick
inputs.description: The event that is emitted when a menu item is clicked.

inputs.name: minWidth
inputs.description:
Sets the minimum width of the popup menu.
This will be applied to the root menu and all submenus.

inputs.name: navigate
inputs.description:
The event that is emitted when the popup menu is navigated.
This is used to handle keyboard navigation within the popup menu.

inputs.name: offset
inputs.description: The offset of the popup menu from the anchor element.

inputs.name: popupConnectionPoint
inputs.description:
The connection point of the popup element to which the anchor will be connected.
Only applicable when `precise` is set to `false`.

inputs.name: precise
inputs.description:
Whether the context menu should be opened with precise positioning.
If true, the context menu will be positioned at the mouse cursor position.
If false, it will be positioned at the target element. If an anchor is provided, it will be anchored to that element.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description:
Sets the border radius of the popup menu.
This will be applied to the root menu and all submenus.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description:
Sets the size of the popup menu.
This will be applied to the root menu and all submenus.

inputs.name: target
inputs.description: The target element that will be used to trigger the popup menu.

inputs.name: trigger
inputs.description: The event that triggers the popup menu.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description:
Sets the width of the popup menu.
This will be applied to the root menu and all submenus.

If null, the item itself will be used as the text representation.

inputs.description:
Emits when user presses enter after typing in the combo box input.

inputs.name: valueField
inputs.description:
Sets the value field of the combo box component.
It can be null, string, or a function that takes an item and returns a string.
If null, the item itself will be used as the value representation.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the checkbox.

inputs.name: tabIndex
inputs.description: Sets the tab index of the checkbox.

inputs.name: indeterminate
inputs.description: Sets the indeterminate state of the checkbox.

inputs.name: inputBlur
inputs.description: Emits when the checkbox is blurred.

inputs.name: inputChange
inputs.description: Emits when the checkbox value changes.

inputs.name: inputFocus
inputs.description: Emits when the checkbox is focused.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description:
Sets the label text of the checkbox.
If provided, it will take precedence over the content inside the checkbox.

inputs.name: labelPosition
inputs.description: Sets the position of the label relative to the checkbox.

inputs.name: labelSize
inputs.description: Sets the size of the label text.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Sets the required state of the checkbox.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the checkmark.

inputs.name: apply
inputs.description:
Emits when the Apply button is clicked.
The `Apply` button is only displayed when `showButtons` is set to true.

inputs.name: cancel
inputs.description:
Emits when the Cancel button is clicked.
The `Cancel` button is only displayed when `showButtons` is set to true.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the color gradient.

inputs.name: format
inputs.description: Specifies the format of the color output.

inputs.name: opacity
inputs.description: Specifies whether the color picker should display the alpha slider.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Specifies the rounded variant of the color picker.

inputs.name: showButtons
inputs.description:
Specifies whether the color picker should display the buttons.
When set to true, the color picker will display the "Apply" and "Cancel" buttons.
When set to false, the color picker will not display the buttons and will emit the color value on change.

inputs.name: showHexInput
inputs.description: Specifies whether the color picker should display the hex input.

inputs.name: showRgbInput
inputs.description: Specifies whether the color picker should display the RGB input.

inputs.name: columns
inputs.description:
The number of columns in the color palette grid.
Only applicable when using a custom palette.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the color palette.

inputs.name: palette
inputs.description:
The type of color palette to use.
This can be either "flat", "material", or "websafe",
or a custom iterable of colors.
If the provided palette is empty, it defaults to the flat color scheme.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the color palette items.

inputs.name: tileSize
inputs.description: The size of each tile in the color palette grid.

inputs.name: closeOnSelect
inputs.description:
Whether to close the color picker when a color is selected.
Only applies when the view is set to "palette".

inputs.name: columns
inputs.description:
The number of columns to display in the color palette.
Only applies when the view is set to "palette" and the palette is a custom array of colors.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the color picker.

inputs.name: opacity
inputs.description:
Whether to display the opacity slider.
Only applies when the view is set to "gradient".

inputs.name: palette
inputs.description:
The type of color palette to use.
This can be a predefined palette type like "flat", "material", or "websafe",
or a custom iterable of colors.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the color picker.

inputs.name: showClearButton
inputs.description:
Whether to show the clear button to reset the color.
This is only applicable when the view is set to "palette".

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: The size of the color picker.

inputs.name: view
inputs.description:
The view mode of the color picker.
This can be either "palette" or "gradient".

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: ARIA label for the input.

inputs.name: decimals
inputs.description: Number of decimals to show.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets whether the input is disabled.

inputs.name: formatter
inputs.description: Formats the value to be displayed in the input when the input is not focused.

inputs.name: inputBlur
inputs.description: Emits when the inner input element is blurred.

inputs.name: inputFocus
inputs.description: Emits when the inner input element is focused.

inputs.name: inputFocusOut
inputs.description: Emits when the inner input element loses focus.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: Maximum value that can be entered.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: Minimum value that can be entered.

inputs.name: nullable
inputs.description: Sets whether the input can be empty.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Sets whether the input is readonly.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Sets whether the input is required.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the input.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the input.

inputs.name: spinners
inputs.description: Sets whether the spin buttons are visible.

inputs.name: step
inputs.description: Step value to increment or decrement the value.

inputs.name: tabindex
inputs.description: Tab index of the input.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the radio button.

inputs.name: inputBlur
inputs.description: emits when the input loses focus.

inputs.name: inputClick
inputs.description: emits when the input is clicked.

inputs.name: inputFocus
inputs.description: emits when the input receives focus.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description:
Sets the label of the radio button.
If provided, it will take precedence over the content inside the radio button.

inputs.name: labelPosition
inputs.description: Sets the position of the label relative to the radio button.

inputs.name: labelSize
inputs.description: Sets the size of the label.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Sets the name of the radio button, useful for grouping radio buttons together.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the radio button.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Sets the value of the radio button.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the slider.

inputs.name: labelPosition
inputs.description: Sets the position of the label relative to the slider track.

inputs.name: labelStep
inputs.description: Display every n<sup>th</sup> label on the slider.

inputs.name: largeTickStep
inputs.description: Display every n<sup>th</sup> tick as large.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: Sets the maximum value of the slider.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: Sets the minimum value of the slider.

inputs.name: orientation
inputs.description: Sets the orientation of the slider.

inputs.name: ranged
inputs.description: Enables ranged mode with two handles for min/max value selection.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the slider handle.

inputs.name: selectionBackground
inputs.description: Sets the background color of the selection area of the slider.

inputs.name: showLabels
inputs.description:
Sets whether to show labels on the slider.
Only applicable if `showTicks` is `true`.

inputs.name: showTicks
inputs.description: Sets whether to show ticks on the slider.

inputs.name: smallTickStep
inputs.description: Displays every n<sup>th</sup> tick on the slider.

inputs.name: step
inputs.description: Sets the step size for the slider.

inputs.name: trackBackground
inputs.description: Sets the background color of the slider track.

inputs.name: trackSize
inputs.description:
Sets the size of the slider track.
For horizontal sliders, this sets the height.
For vertical sliders, this sets the width.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the switch.

inputs.name: offLabel
inputs.description: Sets the off label of the switch.

inputs.name: onLabel
inputs.description: Sets the on label of the switch.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the switch.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the switch.

inputs.name: clearButton
inputs.description: Displays a button to clear the input value.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the text box.

inputs.name: inputBlur
inputs.description: Emits an event when the input loses focus.

inputs.name: inputFocus
inputs.description: Emits an event when the input gains focus.

inputs.name: inputClass
inputs.description: Sets the class for the input element.

inputs.name: inputStyle
inputs.description:
Sets the style for the input element.
Can be a string or a partial CSSStyleDeclaration.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Sets the placeholder text for the input.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Sets the readonly state of the text box.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Sets the required state of the text box.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the text box.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the text box.

inputs.name: type
inputs.description:
Sets the type of the input element.
Defaults to "text".

inputs.name: expanded
inputs.description: Sets whether the expansion panel is expanded or collapsed.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the expansion panel.

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: Sets the title of the expansion panel.

inputs.name: legend
inputs.description: The legend text of the fieldset.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The rounded variant of the fieldset.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description:
The text to display inside the placeholder.
Takes precedence over custom content if both are provided.

inputs.name: arrows
inputs.description: Represents the state of arrows' visibility or activity.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Sets the data of the scroll view.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description:
Sets the height of the scroll view.
This property is required.

inputs.name: index
inputs.description: Sets the active page of the scroll view.

inputs.name: infinite
inputs.description: Sets whether the scroll view is infinite.

inputs.name: pageable
inputs.description: Sets whether the pager is visible.

inputs.name: pagerBlur
inputs.description: Sets the background blur of the pager in pixels.

inputs.name: pagerOverlay
inputs.description: Sets the color of the pager.

inputs.name: pagerRounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the pager items.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description:
Represents the rounded property for a ScrollView component.

The variable `rounded` determines the border radius style to be applied
to the ScrollView. The value "medium" is used as the default rounding level.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description:
Represents the width of an element or component. The value can be specified
either as a string (e.g., to include units like "px", "%", "em") or as a number
(e.g., for unitless numerical values).

This variable is required and must be provided when initializing
or configuring the input.

inputs.name: collapsible
inputs.description: Whether the pane is collapsible.

inputs.name: collapsed
inputs.description: Whether the pane is collapsed.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: The maximum size of the pane.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: The minimum size of the pane.

inputs.name: resizable
inputs.description: Whether the pane is resizable.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: The size of the pane.

inputs.name: linear
inputs.description:
Sets the flow of the stepper.
If set to true, the user will only be able to navigate to the previous or the next step.

inputs.name: orientation
inputs.description: Sets the orientation of the stepper.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the roundness of the stepper steps.

inputs.name: step
inputs.description: Sets the active step of the stepper.

inputs.name: steps
inputs.description: Sets the steps of the stepper.

inputs.name: closable
inputs.description:
Whether the tab is closable.
If true, a close button will be displayed for the tab.
This will take precedence over the `closable` prop on the `mona-tabs` component.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
Whether the tab is disabled.
If true, the tab will be disabled and cannot be selected.
This will take precedence over the `disabled` prop on the `mona-tabs` component.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description: Sets the selected state of the tab.

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: Sets the title of the tab.

inputs.name: closable
inputs.description:
Whether the tabs should be closable.
If true, a close button will be displayed for each tab.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the tabs should be disabled.

inputs.name: keepTabContent
inputs.description:
Whether the tab content should be kept when the tab is closed.
If false, the tab content will be removed from the DOM when the tab is switched to a different tab.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the border radius of the tabs and tab content area.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the tabs.

inputs.name: tabClose
inputs.description: Emitted when a tab is closed.

inputs.name: tabSelect
inputs.description: Emitted when a tab is selected. This event is preventable.

inputs.name: size

inputs.description: The target element that will be used to trigger the context menu.

inputs.description:
Sets the width of the context menu.

inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the menu item.

The click event of the menu item.

Sets the items of the menu.

The click event of the menu item.

inputs.description:
The click event of the menu item.
Emits when the menu item is selected by keyboard or mouse.

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: The title of the radio group.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The value of the selected radio item.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of the menu item.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: The text of the menu item.

inputs.name: menuClick
inputs.description:
The click event of the menu item.
Emits when the menu item is selected by keyboard or mouse.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The value of the radio item.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: ARIA label for the menubar.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledby
inputs.description: ARIA labelledby for the menubar.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets the disabled state of menubar.

inputs.name: menuItemClick
inputs.description: Emits when a menu item is clicked.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Sets the size of the menubar.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: Sets the rounded style of the menubar.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Sets the aria-label for the breadcrumb navigation landmark.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the entire breadcrumb component is disabled.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the breadcrumb item is disabled.

inputs.name: itemClick
inputs.description: Event emitted when the breadcrumb item is clicked.

inputs.name: color
inputs.description:
The color of the circular progress bar.
Can be a string or a function that takes the current value and returns a string.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the circular progress bar is disabled.

inputs.name: indeterminate
inputs.description: Whether the circular progress bar is in indeterminate state.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: The maximum value of the circular progress bar.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: The minimum value of the circular progress bar.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: The size of the circular progress bar.

inputs.name: thickness
inputs.description: The thickness of the circular progress bar.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The value of the circular progress bar.

inputs.name: animate
inputs.description: Whether to animate the progress bar track transition.

inputs.name: color
inputs.description:
The color of the progress bar.
Can be a string or a function that takes the current value and returns a string.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the progress bar is disabled.

inputs.name: indeterminate
inputs.description: Whether the progress bar is in indeterminate state.

inputs.name: labelPosition
inputs.description: The position of the label.

inputs.name: labelStyles
inputs.description: The styles of the label.

inputs.name: labelVisible
inputs.description: Whether the label is visible.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: The maximum value of the progress bar.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: The minimum value of the progress bar.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The border radius of the progress bar.

inputs.name: userClass
inputs.description: The user class of the progress bar.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The value of the progress bar.

inputs.name: displayArrow
inputs.description: Display the arrow of the popover.

inputs.name: hide
inputs.description:
Emits when the popover is about to be closed.
This event is preventable.

inputs.name: hidden
inputs.description: Emits when the popover is hidden.

inputs.name: position
inputs.description: The position of the popover relative to the target element.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The border radius of the popover.

inputs.name: show
inputs.description:
Emits when the popover is about to be shown.
This event is preventable.

inputs.name: shown
inputs.description: Emits when the popover is shown.

inputs.name: target
inputs.description: The target element or ElementRef to which the popover is attached.

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: The title of the popover.

inputs.name: trigger
inputs.description:
The trigger event for showing the popover.
Can be a suitable pointer event like "click" or "pointerenter";

inputs.name: position
inputs.description: The position of the tooltip relative to the target element.

inputs.name: rounded
inputs.description: The border radius of the tooltip.

inputs.name: target
inputs.description:
The target element(s) to which the tooltip is attached.
Can be an Element, ElementRef, or CSS selector string.
